creator: lenzi.sergio@gmail.com
text:
A new generated mate desktop x11/mate does not work the gvfs Trash

In the Desktop, when you move a file into Trash, it remains EMPTY in the icon. On open the Trash, shows empty too, and the property does not allow empty the trash.

The file is moved into the Trash infra structure ~/.local/share/Trash, files, info
and disappears from the original location.
